## Checklist

- [ ] CI is green (typecheck, lint, unit tests, build)
- [ ] Golden calibration test still passes, if this touches the calc engine (`fixtures/expected/golden-bills.json`)
- [ ] Acceptance criteria in the linked issue are met
- [ ] No real usage data, NMIs, meter serials, or files from `Example Files/`/`docs/*.pdf` are included — only `fixtures/` synthetic data
- [ ] Relevant ADR(s) referenced/respected; a new or amended ADR added if this changes an accepted decision
- [ ] `/code-review` run over the diff, findings addressed or explicitly deferred to a follow-up issue
